---
title: "Do we look at a threatening person's face? The relationship between perception and observation of walking strangers"
authors: "Satchell, L. P., Hall, J., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2025
date: 2025-01-01
pub-journal: "Quarterly Journal of Experimental Psychology"
doi: "10.1177/17470218251406631"
pdf: "assets/papers/2025/satchell2025.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions]
---
